title: In France, Trump’s Triumphal Arch Draws Eye Rolls
summary_full: The Arc de Triomphe in Paris, which the president vows to top in Washington, offers a lesson in the complicated history of monuments.
summary_public: The Arc de Triomphe in Paris, which the president vows to top in Washington, offers a lesson in the complicated history of monuments.
